creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
While I updated (and merged) Wine and our Wine port, this patch
	got drastically reduced in size. What still remains does not seem
	necessary according to my reading of the code and the FreeBSD man
	pages and Alexandre Julliard, Wine project leader, agreed as well.

Fix: 

Just remove that patch.
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
